datasets.name: equipment_status
datasets.query: SELECT e.equipment_id, e.equipment_name, e.criticality, e.operating_hours, ROUND(AVG(s.vibration_rms), 2) as avg_vibration, ROUND(AVG(s.temperature_c), 1) as avg_temperature, hg_demos.predictive_maintenance.assess_vibration_status(AVG(s.vibration_rms), AVG(s.temperature_c)) as status, ROUND(hg_demos.predictive_maintenance.estimate_rul(e.operating_hours, AVG(s.vibration_rms), AVG(s.temperature_c)), 0) as rul_hours FROM hg_demos.predictive_maintenance.equipment_master e JOIN hg_demos.predictive_maintenance.sensor_readings s ON e.equipment_id = s.equipment_id GROUP BY ALL ORDER BY rul_hours ASC

datasets.name: status_counts
datasets.query: WITH eq_status AS (SELECT e.equipment_id, hg_demos.predictive_maintenance.assess_vibration_status(AVG(s.vibration_rms), AVG(s.temperature_c)) as status FROM hg_demos.predictive_maintenance.equipment_master e JOIN hg_demos.predictive_maintenance.sensor_readings s ON e.equipment_id = s.equipment_id GROUP BY e.equipment_id) SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM eq_status GROUP BY status

datasets.name: vibration_trend
datasets.query: SELECT equipment_id, DATE(timestamp) as date, ROUND(AVG(vibration_rms), 2) as avg_vibration FROM hg_demos.predictive_maintenance.sensor_readings GROUP BY equipment_id, DATE(timestamp) ORDER BY date
